caseStudies.title: NDII
caseStudies.summary: High-assurance national digital intelligence infrastructure for consolidating critical sovereign data streams, sector intelligence, and governed operational oversight.
caseStudies.challenge: National-scale digital intelligence requires strict data control, sector-level visibility, and technical autonomy. Critical systems cannot depend on opaque data movement, weak governance paths, or proprietary lock-in when public-sector decisions and infrastructure operations are involved.
caseStudies.solution: NDII is structured as a governed infrastructure layer for sovereign data consolidation, operational intelligence, and sector modules across telecom, health, transport, energy, and revenue domains. The architecture emphasizes kernel isolation, interface-first validation, and traceable enforcement paths.
impact: Consolidates critical data streams without unauthorized data egress
Supports sector intelligence across telecom, health, transport, energy, and revenue
Strengthens operational governance through locked execution boundaries
Reduces proprietary lock-in through interface-first engineering discipline

caseStudies.title: Wakala OS
caseStudies.summary: Wakala OS is the Codegx automation operating system for agentic workflows, structured business process automation, reporting, onboarding, and dependable operations.
caseStudies.challenge: Operational teams need automation that remains traceable, controlled, and maintainable after launch. Most automation initiatives fail when workflow ownership, escalation, and reporting are treated as afterthoughts.
caseStudies.solution: Wakala OS structures automation around ownership, control paths, reporting, and accountable execution. It is designed for workflows where the organization must know what happened, who owns the next step, and how exceptions are handled.
impact: Creates a governed operating layer for recurring workflows
Supports accountable agentic and human-in-the-loop execution
Improves visibility across reporting, onboarding, and process handoffs
Anchors Codegx automation work within one coherent platform estate

caseStudies.title: TendaNow
caseStudies.summary: Accountability and digital portfolio platform that turns personal goals, learning progress, and completed work into verifiable records of growth.
caseStudies.challenge: Most goal trackers, coaching tools, and portfolio builders treat intention, daily effort, skill evidence, and institutional visibility as separate experiences. TendaNow needed a coherent journey that could support individuals, students, schools, and teams without forcing users into one channel.
caseStudies.solution: Codegx helped shape TendaNow as a Kenya-first accountability and growth platform: goals are decomposed into tasks, progress is supported across Web, WhatsApp, and Telegram, and completed work is translated into a digital portfolio with skills, achievements, source tracking, and SDG alignment.
impact: Connects goals, tasks, skills, and achievements into a unified learning journey
Supports multi-channel guidance across Web, WhatsApp, and Telegram
Generates digital portfolio evidence from continuous progress
Extends toward institutional oversight through the Global Growth Engine for schools and teams

caseStudies.title: CodeCrusher
caseStudies.summary: Semantic code intelligence platform for teams that need architecture visibility, pattern discovery, and systematic technical-debt reduction.
caseStudies.challenge: Large codebases hide architectural drift, duplicated patterns, and refactoring risk behind surface-level syntax. Teams need to understand system intent before changing critical software.
caseStudies.solution: CodeCrusher focuses on semantic code understanding: identifying patterns, surfacing reusable solutions, and supporting architecture governance across evolving repositories.
impact: Improves visibility into codebase architecture
Supports technical-debt discovery
Helps teams reason about refactoring risk
Builds toward governed software maintenance

caseStudies.title: BizGen
caseStudies.summary: Multilingual business intelligence platform for concept generation, entrepreneurial development, and early market validation.
caseStudies.challenge: Early-stage founders often make high-cost decisions with limited market signal, weak validation structure, and fragmented advisory support.
caseStudies.solution: BizGen helps founders move from broad ideas to clearer hypotheses, market questions, operating models, and validation paths.
impact: Structures concept development
Supports early market validation
Provides founder decision support
Designed for multilingual and emerging-market contexts
